chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-19 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on M.A. No.1625/2025. 3. For orders on M.A. No.1626/2025. 4. For hearing of M.A. No.66/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 11.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan, Advocate for the respondents No.4 to 6. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. = At the very outset, learned counsel for respondents No.4 to 6 submits that one Shoukat Ali has already been relieved from service and Ahmed Ali has since retired; therefore, the petition has become infructuous. If this is the position of the case, and as no one appears on behalf of the petitioner, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss lis in default. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
